Purchasing Settings

The Purchasing Settings page (/settings/purchasing) controls how supplier invoices are processed: the default tax rate and label, which GL account is used for accounts payable, how confident the AI must be before auto-posting, and how closely a repeat invoice must match a historical one for pattern-based auto-posting.

Tax settings

SettingDefaultNotes
Default tax rate15.00%The tax rate applied to new invoice lines when no rate is specified. Adjust to match your jurisdiction's standard rate (e.g. 15% for South African VAT, 10% for Australian GST).
Tax labelVATThe label shown for tax on invoices, reports, and the UI. Change to "GST" or your jurisdiction's equivalent if needed.

Default payable account

SettingDefaultNotes
Default payable account2000The GL account code used as the default accounts payable control account when posting purchase invoices. This is a code (not an account name); it must match an account in your chart of accounts. Can be overridden per supplier.

Confidence thresholds

The AI returns a confidence score between 0 and 1 for each extraction. Two thresholds control how this score affects processing:

SettingDefaultWhat happens when the score is below this
Fallback confidence0.80The fast model (Haiku) result is discarded and the extraction is retried using the strong model (Sonnet)
Auto-post confidence0.90The invoice is not eligible for automatic posting and remains in the review queue

NEEDS CONFIRMATION: the README describes confidence bands of ≥ 85% (auto-posted), 60–84% (review queue), and < 60% (flagged). These differ from the default setting values of 0.90 and 0.80. Confirm which values are canonical for your installation — the settings page values take precedence over any documentation example.

Matching tolerances

Pattern-based auto-posting compares a new invoice against the supplier's most recently posted invoice. Two tolerances control how close the match must be:

SettingDefaultNotes
Amount tolerance10.0%Maximum percentage difference between a line's amount and the corresponding line on the previous invoice. Lines differing by more than this block auto-posting.
Description similarity60.0Minimum similarity score (0–100) between a line description and the corresponding description on the previous invoice. Lines with lower similarity block auto-posting.

Settings reference

KeyTypeDefault
default_payable_accountstring (account code)2000
tax_default_ratefloat (%)15.00
tax_labelstringVAT
autopost_confidencefloat (0–1)0.90
fallback_confidencefloat (0–1)0.80
amount_tolerancefloat (%)10.0
description_similarityfloat (0–100)60.0
